$comment: Layer B selection cases for SHIPPING vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The zero-weight GO TO REJECT-PARA guard means an empty package prints STATUS=REJ with no COST line; a candidate that drops the guard prices it (STATUS=STD COST=0.00) and is caught on every zero case. Cases cover the reject path, both sides of the 200.00 cap (42.10 -> 199.98 STD, 42.11 -> 200.02 CAP), a half-cent ROUNDED cost, and a deep-cap weight.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 SHIPPING (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-shipping)
